tputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"","type":"string"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"ticker","type":"string"},{"internalType":"string","name":"assetName","type":"string"},{"internalType":"address","name":"vault","type":"address"}],"name":"listAsset","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"asset","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"listedCount","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"listedKeys","outputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newAdmin","type":"address"}],"name":"setAdmin","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Uses EIP-1167 minimal proxy clones so that listAsset() stays well      under the 500 k-gas default call limit. A single SyntheticAsset      implementation is deployed once in the constructor; every subsequent      listing clones it (~45 bytes) and calls initialize() instead of      deploying a fresh 2 KB contract (~580 k gas \u2192 ~170 k gas per listing).","kind":"dev","methods":{"listAsset(string,string,address)":{"params":{"assetName":"Full name (e.g., \"Apple Inc. \u2014 Synthetic\")","ticker":"Trading symbol (e.g., \"AAPL\")","vault":"CollateralVault address (will be the sole minter)"},"returns":{"asset":"Address of the deployed SyntheticAsset"}}},"title":"SyntheticAssetFactory","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"assets(bytes32)":{"notice":"ticker key \u2192 SyntheticAsset address"},"delistAsset(string)":{"notice":"Remove a stock from the listed set (doesn't destroy the token)."},"getAsset(string)":{"notice":"Get asset address by ticker"},"implementation()":{"notice":"Shared SyntheticAsset implementation (cloned for each listing)"},"listAsset(string,string,address)":{"notice":"Deploy a new SyntheticAsset token for a stock."},"listedCount()":{"notice":"Total number of listed assets"},"listedKeys(uint256)":{"notice":"All listed tickers (display/enumeration)"},"setAdmin(address)":{"notice":"Transfer admin"}},"notice":"Deploys and tracks SyntheticAsset ERC-20 tokens for listed stocks.         Called by the admin (governance) to list new stocks. The vault         address passed at listing time becomes the sole minter.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/stocks/SyntheticAssetFactory.sol":"SyntheticAssetFactory"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/stocks/SyntheticAsset.sol":{"keccak256":"0x188351baa2b58c5e80b92af00cf16b2e463ac60ce5bac9b5980cbb9ef4596a88","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ebaca65a1d5825fb395534619fc18455933e1d74bc16c70bac9f34761d3bba6d","dweb:/ipfs/Qma8Dw6H7eqJ6qaGjHKfgYRX9XPy94JGp9dQ4YXsim9aJ8"]},"src/stocks/SyntheticAssetFactory.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0557ac067b7e7dd8b9f1e7c36924c8983eedb78aa4d6ae4d5800a92bbac31173","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://050a3d301c040f5a7a20efe2939c0f9c8c66b6a53d9671972e17575f3f25bf82","dweb:/ipfs/QmWLwx3bjpfWxJGSZ83hXZUtgN94YJnXxZS99Ncrxwshzr"]}},"version":1}

params.vault: CollateralVault address (will be the sole minter)

delistAsset(string).notice: Remove a stock from the listed set (doesn't destroy the token).

implementation().notice: Shared SyntheticAsset implementation (cloned for each listing)

listAsset(string,string,address).notice: Deploy a new SyntheticAsset token for a stock.

documentation.text: @notice Shared SyntheticAsset implementation (cloned for each listing)
@notice Remove a stock from the listed set (doesn't destroy the token).
@notice Deploy an EIP-1167 minimal proxy pointing at `impl`.
